title: Reclamation
description: Reclaim items lost upon death using a spectral spyglass!
body:
This mod adds a spectral spyglass which will make items dropped from any entity's death glow when looking through it, including the player's.

The spectral spyglass is crafted with four echo shards, like so:

![A spyglass surrounded by four echo shards crafts a spectral spyglass](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/friedkeenan/reclamation/main/images/spectral_spyglass.png)

Similarly, the recipe of the recovery compass has been made less expensive, now only requiring four echo shards:

![A compass surrounded by four echo shards crafts a recovery compass](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/friedkeenan/reclamation/main/images/recovery_compass.png)

## Showcase

Items dropped from an entity's death will glow when looking through the spectral spyglass:

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/friedkeenan/reclamation/main/images/direct_glow.png)

The glow will appear through blocks:

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/friedkeenan/reclamation/main/images/indirect_glow.png)
